violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed food stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Single use cardboard was being used as a shelf liner.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Handwashing sink was blocked by a garbage can.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed cases of food stored on the floor in the walk in cooler.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50 ppm.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. A cooler containing commercial dressing maintained an internal temperature of 46 F.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
